zh.lifeSummary: 當Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire於1407年之前出生在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德時，他的父親John de Wassheburne50歲，母親Margarett Poher28歲。他於1435年與Elizabeth Knivton結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年10月2日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire于1407年之前出生在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德时，他的父亲John de Wassheburne50岁，母亲Margarett Poher28岁。他于1435年与Elizabeth Knivton结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年10月2日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維其福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Washburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Normon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from any of the numerous places so called from Old English norð ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire was born before 1407, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, his father, John de Wassheburne, was 50 and his mother, Margarett Poher, was 28. He married Elizabeth Knivton in 1435. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died before 2 October 1479, in his hometown, and was buried in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stanford, Worcestershire, England: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire est né avant 1407, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Wassheburne, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margarett Poher, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Knivton en 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé avant 2 octobre 1479, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stanford, Worcestershire, England: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire vor 1407 in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Wassheburne 50 und seine Mutter Margarett Poher 28. Er hat 1435 Elizabeth Knivton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb vor 2. Oktober 1479 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire è nato il prima del 1407 nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John de Wassheburne, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Margarett Poher, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Knivton nel 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì prima del 2 ottobre 1479, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershireが1407年以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで生まれた時，父John de Wassheburneは50歳，母Margarett Poherは28歳であった。1435年にElizabeth Knivtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年10月2日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire(이)가 1407년 이전 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Wassheburne(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarett Poher(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1435년 Elizabeth Knivton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 10월 2일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire nasceu antes 1407, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Wassheburne, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margarett Poher, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Knivton em 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 2 de outubro de 1479, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stanford, Worcestershire, England: станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire родился перед 1407 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Wassheburne было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarett Poher, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Knivton в 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер перед 2 октябрь 1479 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
